AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
    IMPORT [[7082546018834]] 1.0
    IMPORT dev.pragmatically.clipboardinjector 0.1
    
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[6502786168]]#[[233745975898428]] > [[8398044571386570029]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[7712155293725601]][.[[214634455770]]=`toolbarProvider.editingTools`]
        INSERT {
            ~&454089850271038938&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: clipboardPasteButton
                ~&233745975898428&~: ~&6504254477&~
                ~&6504337259&~: ~&454089850271038938&~.~&6503187275&~.~&14888501028015932088&~
                ~&4610919725500260482&~: 0

                ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"7424592205469683787&~
                ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&7712989577739634&~
                
                property ~&6503679477&~ hasSceneLineItemVtable: ~&214625660372&~;
                function ensureVtablePtr() {
                    ~&5972376&~ (hasSceneLineItemVtable) {
                        ~&7083121450889&~;
                    }
                    ~&11179472971324505115&~.~&1530850700149128507&~();
                    ClipboardInjector.sleepMs(10);
                    ~&11179472971324505115&~.~&7290246973319684518&~(ClipboardInjector.createLine(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(-5, -10), ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(5, -10)));
                    ClipboardInjector.sleepMs(10);
                    ~&11179472971324505115&~.~&4014536534597030701&~(ClipboardInjector.createCircle(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, -10), 10));
                    ClipboardInjector.sleepMs(10);
                    hasSceneLineItemVtable = ClipboardInjector.setupVtablePtr(~&11179472971324505115&~.~&5308518110917893541&~(~&11179472971324505115&~.~&15752433948179392809&~, ~&254547437090201330&~.~&15777890623490054006&~));
                    ~&11179472971324505115&~.~&9916821940477829159&~(~&11179472971324505115&~.~&15752433948179392809&~);
                    ~&11179472971324505115&~.~&1530850700149128507&~();
                }

                ~&254542253295368380&~: {
                    ensureVtablePtr();
                    ~&6504254477&~.~&233718999756776&~(clipboardPasteButton);
                    ~&6504254477&~.~&3352491319205423503&~();
                    ~&254480318283987577&~.~&214629893131&~ = ClipboardInjector.loadFromJSON("/tmp/clipboard_inject.json");
                }
            }

            ~&454089850271038938&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: areaCaptureButton
                ~&233745975898428&~: ~&6504254477&~
                ~&6504337259&~: ~&454089850271038938&~.~&6503187275&~.~&14888501028015932088&~
                ~&4610919725500260482&~: 0

                ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"15094524446771540356&~
                ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&7712989577739634&~

                ~&254542253295368380&~: {
                    cropOverlay.~&233748328658231&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE

    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&6502786168&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: cropOverlay
                ~&7083038346995&~: ~&254547437090201330&~
                ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                ~&180995&~: 99999
                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&214625660372&~

                ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                    ~&214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~
                    ~&233739540775906&~: 0.3
                }

                property ~&6504243117&~ ~&7083177689071&~: 0
                property ~&6504243117&~ ~&7083177689072&~: 0
                property ~&6504243117&~ endX: 0
                property ~&6504243117&~ endY: 0
                property ~&6503679477&~ isDragging: ~&214625660372&~

                ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: selectionBox
                    ~&214622605608&~: ~&"503220030291830651&~
                    ~&7082507052999&~.~&214622605608&~: ~&"214646069354&~
                    ~&7082507052999&~.~&214646099849&~: 2
                    ~&233748328658231&~: cropOverlay.isDragging
                    ~&180993&~: ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~(cropOverlay.~&7083177689071&~, cropOverlay.endX)
                    ~&180994&~: ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~(cropOverlay.~&7083177689072&~, cropOverlay.endY)
                    ~&214646099849&~: ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(cropOverlay.endX - cropOverlay.~&7083177689071&~)
                    ~&7082729686082&~: ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(cropOverlay.endY - cropOverlay.~&7083177689072&~)
                }

                ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                    preventStealing: ~&6504329801&~

                    ~&254542253295368380&~: (~&214634474738&~) => {
                        cropOverlay.~&7083177689071&~ = ~&214634474738&~.~&180993&~;
                        cropOverlay.~&7083177689072&~ = ~&214634474738&~.~&180994&~;
                        cropOverlay.endX = ~&214634474738&~.~&180993&~;
                        cropOverlay.endY = ~&214634474738&~.~&180994&~;
                        cropOverlay.isDragging = ~&6504329801&~;
                    }

                    ~&12756630929064311461&~: (~&214634474738&~) => {
                        cropOverlay.endX = ~&214634474738&~.~&180993&~;
                        cropOverlay.endY = ~&214634474738&~.~&180994&~;
                    }

                    ~&8399894427451672267&~: (~&214634474738&~) => {
                        cropOverlay.isDragging = ~&214625660372&~;
                        cropOverlay.~&233748328658231&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                        
                        ~&197102514&~ rw = ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(cropOverlay.endX - cropOverlay.~&7083177689071&~);
                        ~&197102514&~ rh = ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(cropOverlay.endY - cropOverlay.~&7083177689072&~);
                        
                        ~&5972376&~ (rw > 10 && rh > 10) {
                            ~&197102514&~ rx = ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~(cropOverlay.~&7083177689071&~, cropOverlay.endX);
                            ~&197102514&~ ry = ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~(cropOverlay.~&7083177689072&~, cropOverlay.endY);
                            
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&5972579&~ = ClipboardInjector.captureArea(rx, ry, rw, rh);
                            ~&5972376&~ (~&5972579&~) {
                                clipboardPasteButton.ensureVtablePtr();
                                ~&254480318283987577&~.~&214629893131&~ = ClipboardInjector.loadFromJSON("/tmp/clipboard_inject.json");
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        REDEFINE [[4367731859579753176]]
            LOCATE AFTER ALL
            INSERT { -2 }
        END REDEFINE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
